title: Towers of the Wild Modded
description: Towers of the Wild - added to multiple dimensions and planets + waystone & paragliders
body:
This mod adds a specific type of structure, tall towers inspired by Towers of the Wild.

These towers have a waystone and a chest at the top. You will find a paraglider in the chest everytime, on top of other loot. The waystones are used as a beacon to transport between lands for modpacks that might wish to disable elytra flight or other.

 

The idea of the mod is to add a structure type to discover when exploring the world and have more to interact with.

 

The mod adds towers for:

Ad Astra Planets

Blue Skies Dimensions

Twilight Forest (not spawning in 1.19.2 due to Twilight Forest code)

Overworld (several variances such as desert, badlands, ice, regular, etc)

End

Nether

Rats (Ratlantis Dimension)

Aether



Try out my modpack, which has Towers of the Wild Modded included inside!

[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/54eqfZSC/images/61842b8075cde1956fbe36b8b5f319e61220ddbc.png)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-planetary)


[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/54eqfZSC/images/890b33b406330933f7dee80e8b8e82482b1a67ca.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/celsiusqc)



 

Permission has been granted to use structures from Towers of the Wild: Reworked (Datapack) Minecraft Resource Packs - CurseForge & Towers of the Wild: Additions Minecraft Mods - CurseForge

The permission screenshots can be found in the GitHub repo either by clicking source or through this link: celsiusqc/totw_modded_mod (github.com)

The permission to use the data structures was not required as both the mod and datapack were listed with an MIT license, but I felt like it was still worth getting.
